texto: The effect your readers want is for what they read to trigger in them the sights and sounds and smells of what's happening in the story. They don't want approximations, they don't want a report, they want to experience the story's reality.
explicacao: Citação de Ray Rhamey sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The effect your readers want is for what they read to trigger in them the sights and sounds and s…” articula reflexao, writing-process, story em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
